title: Warhammer Quest Old and New
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wHcblaGXua8

Daniel (@dungeondive) offers a brief shelf tour spotlighting one of his favourite collection displays: old-school Talisman alongside the complete Warhammer Quest family—the original 1995 game, Advanced HeroQuest, and the modern entries Silver Tower, Shadows Over Hammerhal, Cursed City, and Blackstone Fortress. A quick snapshot of a shelf that spans decades of dungeon crawling.

----

What does your Warhammer Quest shelf look like?
